info.name: Art Institute of Chicago Public API

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of resource IDs to fetch in one call.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of records to return per page (default 12, max 100).

params.name: page
params.description: Page number (1-based).

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response (sparse fieldsets).

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include (e.g. artist_pivots, dates, place_pivots, sites).

items.docs: A list of all artworks sorted by last updated date in descending order.

params.name: q
params.description: Free-text search string.

params.name: query
params.description: Elasticsearch Query DSL JSON (URL-encoded).

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort specification (Elasticsearch sort syntax).

params.name: from
params.description: Elasticsearch offset pagination starting record.

params.name: size
params.description: Elasticsearch page size (max 100).

params.name: facets
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to facet on for aggregations.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response (sparse fieldsets).

items.docs: Search artworks data in the aggregator. Artworks in the groups of essentials are boosted so they'll show up higher in results.
